sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ لَيْلَى مُصَمِّمَةً مِنْ مَنْزِلِهَا فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla radi kao dizajnerica iz svog doma u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Layla works as a designer from her home in the city.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ الْحَاسُوبَ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ زُمَلَائِهَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan koristi računar za komunikaciju sa svojim kolegama.
sentences.translationEn: She uses the computer to communicate with her colleagues every day.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا النَّوْعُ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ يُوَفِّرُ لَهَا الْكَثِيرَ مِنَ الْوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Ova vrsta posla joj štedi mnogo vremena.
sentences.translationEn: This type of work saves her a lot of time.

sentences.arabic: تُفَضِّلُ لَيْلَى الْهُدُوءَ لِتَزِيدَ مِنْ إِنْتَاجِيَّتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Lejla preferira mir kako bi povećala svoju produktivnost.
sentences.translationEn: Layla prefers quiet to increase her productivity.
